twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.masterIntro: One permanent code that always works to sign in or to turn off two-factor authentication. It is never used up. Store it somewhere very safe — anyone with it can bypass 2FA.
twoFactor.masterRegenPrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to generate a new master code. Your old master code will stop working.
twoFactor.setupScan: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, 1Password…).
twoFactor.setupManual: Can't scan? Enter this setup key manually:
twoFactor.setupVerify: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to finish:
twoFactor.backupWarning: Each code works once. Keep them somewhere safe — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.disablePrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to turn off two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.regeneratePrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to generate a new set. Your old backup codes will stop working.
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code isn't valid. Try again.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your personal details, security, and preferences.
account.passwordIntro: We'll email a reset link to {email}. Follow it to set a new password.
account.twoFactorIntro: Require a one-time code from an authenticator app when you sign in.
account.linkedIntro: The ways you can sign in to this account.
account.dangerIntro: Permanently close your account. You'll be signed out and will need a new invitation or join request to access organizations again.
account.deleteDialogWarn: This archives your user record. This action cannot be undone from the app.
account.closeIntro: Close your account permanently. You'll be signed out and will need a new invitation to return.

emails.title: Email addresses
emails.intro: Your primary email is used to sign in. Add others for recovery or external sign-in.
emails.enterCodeHint: Enter the code we sent to this address.
emails.codeSentDetail: Check the inbox for the verification code.
emails.taken: This email is already in use.
emails.invalidCode: That code isn't valid. Try again.
emails.oauthManaged: Your primary email is managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed.
emails.connectIntro: Connect an external account to sign in with it and add its email.

workspace.emptyHint: No workspaces yet. Create one to get started.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to continue to Relativa.
auth.emailCheckFailed: Couldn't verify your email. Please try again.
auth.rememberMeInfo: Keeps you signed in on this device after you close the browser. Leave it off on shared or public computers.
auth.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth.oauthFailed: We couldn't sign you in with that provider. Please try again.
auth.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password to sign in.
auth.enterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.phoneInfo: We use your phone to verify your account and to help you recover access if you lose your password.
auth.birthDateInfo: We collect your date of birth to confirm you meet the minimum age and to help verify your identity.
auth.firstNameTooShort: First name must be at least 2 characters
auth.lastNameTooShort: Last name must be at least 2 characters
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.emailExists: A user with this email already exists.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.checkInboxBody: If {email} is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.linkExpiredBody: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used. Reset links expire after 1 hour.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a 6-character code to {target}. Enter it below to activate your account.
auth.checkPhoneBody: We texted a 6-character code to {target}. Enter it below to activate your account.
auth.verificationResent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.twoFactorBody: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.twoFactorBackupBody: Enter one of your one-time backup codes.
auth.twoFactorInvalid: That code isn't valid. Try again.
auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
auth.verifyingBody: Just a moment while we confirm your email address.
auth.verifiedBody: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyFailedBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

support.title: Contact support
support.sent: Thanks! Your message has been sent.
support.sendFailed: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.subtitle: Create a new organization or join an existing one.
onboarding.createHint: Start fresh and invite your team.
onboarding.joinHint: Find an existing organization and request access.
onboarding.joinRequestSent: Join request sent. An administrator will review it.
onboarding.noOrganizationsYet: No organizations yet. Create your first one above.
onboarding.selectOrgHint: Select an organization to manage it.

status.badRequest: The request is invalid. Please check the highlighted fields.
status.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
status.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
status.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
status.unprocessable: The request could not be processed.
status.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
status.server: The server encountered an unexpected error. Please try again later.
status.badGateway: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
status.serviceUnavailable: The service is unavailable. Please try again later.
status.gatewayTimeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again later.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.two_factor_required: A two-factor authentication code is required.
errors.email_address_taken: This email address is already in use.
errors.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
